title: The Declaration Reaches the World
description: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this part follows Franky, Rob Lucci, Blueno, Luffy, Nami. The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Why did you come to rescue me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Interesting!!! What're they gonna do now!? Wahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: ... they did that on their own.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh!? Because you ate that weird fruit?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: But, let's wait for a while...

summary: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
